caption: The video features a man sitting inside a vehicle, likely an ambulance given the visible medical symbol on the window behind him. He is wearing a light gray polo shirt with a logo and text that reads "IOM," suggesting he may be associated with the International Organization for Migration. The man appears to be speaking, as indicated by the subtitles that read, "so when I came back" and "I was able to use my experience here at IOM." His expression is serious and engaged, indicating that he is sharing important information or recounting a personal experience related to his work or involvement with the organization. The setting and his attire suggest a professional context, possibly involving humanitarian or medical aid.
